title: Image Pull Failure
resolution: Refresh registry credentials.
lessons_learned: Improve monitoring and add preventive alerts.

title: Database Connection Timeout
root_cause: PostgreSQL stopped accepting new client connections.
resolution: Increase connection pool and restart database.
lessons_learned: Improve monitoring and add preventive alerts.

title: Redis Cache Failure
root_cause: Redis became unavailable because of memory pressure.
resolution: Restart Redis and warm cache.
lessons_learned: Improve monitoring and add preventive alerts.
